name: Mariana Tek Boutique Fitness Management API
what_it_does: Mariana Tek boutique fitness studio management REST API for yoga, cycling, barre, pilates, and HIIT studios to manage class reservations, memberships, and branded mobile app experiences. Enables AI agents to manage member and client profile management for boutique fitness studio automation, handle class and appointment scheduling with waitlist management for fitness booking automation, access membership and series pack management for studio revenue automation, retrieve instructor schedule and performance tracking for studio staff automation, manage branded mobile app and client-facing experience for fitness studio engagement automation, handle multi-location member access for boutique fitness brand network automation, access marketing automation and email campaign integration for studio member engagement, retrieve real-time class occupancy and waitlist data for capacity management automation, manage gift card and retail product sales for studio ancillary revenue automation, and integrate Mariana Tek with payment processors and marketing tools for boutique fitness brand management.
use_cases: Booking boutique fitness classes from studio scheduling automation agents
Managing class waitlists from capacity optimization automation agents
Tracking instructor performance from studio operations agents
Running branded mobile apps from boutique fitness brand agents
not_for: Large health club chains (use ABC Fitness)
Medical fitness and physical therapy management
best_when: A boutique fitness brand (yoga, cycling, barre, pilates, HIIT) wanting AI agents to automate class booking, waitlist management, member engagement, and branded mobile app experience within Mariana Tek's platform.
avoid_when: WAITLIST PROMOTION NOTIFICATION TIMING TCPA COMPLIANCE: Automated waitlist class spot promotion via Mariana Tek must send SMS notification within TCPA timing restrictions; automated late-night or early-morning waitlist promotion SMS creates TCPA violation; implement 8am-9pm local time constraint on automated waitlist promotion notifications. INSTRUCTOR SUBSTITUTION CLIENT NOTIFICATION: Automated instructor substitution notifications via Mariana Tek must reach clients with sufficient advance notice; automated class plan creation without instructor substitution notification creates member experience failure for instructor-loyal boutique fitness clients. MEMBERSHIP FREEZE AND PAUSE BILLING STATE COMPLIANCE: Automated membership freeze and billing pause via Mariana Tek must comply with state auto-renewal and consumer protection requirements; automated billing during member-requested freeze creates state consumer protection violation and chargeback.

auth.notes: Mariana Tek uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Washington DC HQ. Founded 2016 by Genna Elvin. Acquired by Xplor Technologies in 2021. Part of Xplor fitness portfolio alongside Trainerize and other fitness software. Focused on boutique fitness brands: yoga (CorePower Yoga), cycling, barre, pilates, HIIT. Branded mobile app platform. Multi-location support. Competes with Mindbody, Glofox, and WellnessLiving for boutique fitness studio management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-location subscription for boutique fitness brands
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-location monthly subscription; enterprise pricing for multi-location boutique fitness brands; branded mobile app tier for larger brands
pricing.notes: Washington DC. Xplor Technologies subsidiary since 2021. Per-location subscription. Enterprise pricing for multi-location brands. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; booking and member queries throttled; webhooks for booking and payment events

known_agent_gotchas: WAITLIST PROMOTION RACE CONDITION: Mariana Tek waitlist promotion to class spot may have race condition when multiple waitlisted members are promoted simultaneously; automated waitlist management must handle promotion conflict error when spot was claimed by another member; implement retry with next-priority waitlist member on promotion conflict

XPLOR PLATFORM CONSOLIDATION API CHANGES: Mariana Tek was acquired by Xplor Technologies in 2021; Xplor platform consolidation across Mariana Tek and other fitness acquisitions may result in API endpoint migration; monitor Xplor developer communications for API deprecation and migration timeline; build abstraction layer for API endpoints most likely to change

INSTRUCTOR-SPECIFIC CLASS BOOKING DEMAND: Boutique fitness class demand varies significantly by instructor; automated capacity and scheduling optimization must account for instructor popularity differential; automated class scheduling without instructor demand data creates capacity mismatch between high-demand instructor slots and available class spots

BRANDED MOBILE APP REVIEW PROPAGATION LAG: Automated updates to class descriptions and studio information via Mariana Tek API may have propagation delay to branded mobile app; automated schedule updates submitted through API may not immediately appear in client-facing branded app; implement propagation delay check before client-facing automated schedule communications

SERIES PACK EXPIRATION REVENUE RECOGNITION: Automated revenue reporting via Mariana Tek must distinguish between upfront series pack payment and class visit redemption timing; series pack revenue recognized at sale vs visit redemption creates accounting reconciliation difference; verify revenue recognition treatment before automated financial reporting integration

GDPR DATA SUBJECT REQUEST FOR INTERNATIONAL STUDIOS: Mariana Tek supports boutique fitness brands with international (European) studio locations; automated member data management for EU studio locations must implement GDPR data subject rights (access, erasure, portability); automated data retention that retains EU member data beyond GDPR retention period creates GDPR violation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Boutique fitness management. PCI-DSS, GDPR. OAuth2. US/CA/EU. Member personal data, payment info, and fitness booking records.

security_score_components.security_notes: Boutique fitness. PCI-DSS, GDPR. OAuth2. US/CA/EU. Member personal, payment, and class booking data.
